title: Roaring Tyrannosaurus Rex Coloring Page
seoTitle: Roaring Tyrannosaurus Rex Coloring Page (Printable PDF)
seoDescription: A dynamic coloring sheet featuring a roaring Tyrannosaurus Rex in a prehistoric landscape of ferns and volcanoes. Standard line weight, free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Tyrannosaurus Rex lived during the Late Cretaceous period in forested river valleys, hunting armored dinosaurs like Triceratops.
The forward-facing eyes of Tyrannosaurus Rex gave it excellent depth perception, a trait common in advanced predators.
